name: Oatmeal
recipeIngredient: Scant cup soymilk, regular milk, water or combination
A tablespoon of maple syrup (optional, but the maple-banana combo is great)
A little more milk if you like it smoother
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine first three ingredients and microwave on HIGH for 4 minutes.
2. Stir in remaining ingredients.
That's it - the creamiest, smoothest, most satisfying oatmeal ever.
